name: dual-agent-vscode
description: VS Code extension for deterministic dual-agent code generation and review workflows.

dualAgent.workflow.autoRun.description: Automatically continue through stages until the workflow completes or fails.

dualAgent.workflow.maxIterations.description: Maximum number of workflow review cycles before stopping.

dualAgent.workflow.stages.description: Ordered stage definitions for the dual-agent workflow.

dualAgent.workflow.files.agentAOutput.description: Agent A generation output file name.

dualAgent.workflow.files.agentBOutput.description: Agent B generation output file name.

dualAgent.agentA.commandTemplate.default: echo Configure dualAgent.agentA.commandTemplate to run your CLI with {{promptFile}} and write {{outputFile}}
dualAgent.agentA.commandTemplate.description: Command template for Agent A. Supports placeholders like {{promptFile}}, {{outputFile}}, {{workspaceFolder}} and {{runtimeDir}}.

dualAgent.agentA.generatePrompt.default: You are Agent A in generator mode. Read {{taskFile}}, {{reviewFile}}, and write a generation receipt to {{outputFile}} after updating workspace files.
dualAgent.agentA.generatePrompt.description: Prompt template for Agent A generate stages.

dualAgent.agentA.reviewPrompt.default: You are Agent A in reviewer mode. Review the latest generation output and workspace changes, then write structured review JSON to {{outputFile}}.
dualAgent.agentA.reviewPrompt.description: Prompt template for Agent A review stages.

dualAgent.agentB.commandTemplate.default: echo Configure dualAgent.agentB.commandTemplate to run your CLI with {{promptFile}} and write {{outputFile}}
dualAgent.agentB.commandTemplate.description: Command template for Agent B. Supports placeholders like {{promptFile}}, {{outputFile}}, {{workspaceFolder}} and {{runtimeDir}}.

dualAgent.agentB.generatePrompt.default: You are Agent B in generator mode. Read {{taskFile}}, {{reviewFile}}, and write a generation receipt to {{outputFile}} after updating workspace files.
dualAgent.agentB.generatePrompt.description: Prompt template for Agent B generate stages.

dualAgent.agentB.reviewPrompt.default: You are Agent B in reviewer mode. Review the latest generation output and workspace changes, then write structured review JSON to {{outputFile}}.
dualAgent.agentB.reviewPrompt.description: Prompt template for Agent B review stages.

dualAgent.runtime.invalidOutputRetries.description: How many invalid output writes are tolerated before failing the stage.

dualAgent.runtime.watchDebounceMs.description: Debounce for file watcher stage completion handling.
